channel.title: Vlm on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Vlm on Arrans github.io

item.title: huggingface/transformers
item.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

item.title: hybridgroup/yzma
item.description: Go with your own intelligence - Go applications that directly integrate llama.cpp for local inference using hardware acceleration.
